title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: - **Bug confirmed**: `fugue-codex-implement` has no `implement_request` / `implement_confirmed` workflow-call inputs, so caller override cannot be consumed. [.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L5) - **Bug confirmed**: caller `codex-implement` invocation does not pass `needs.ctx.outputs.has_implement_request` / `has_implement_confirmed` to implement workflow. [.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L838) - **Root cause in prepare**: implement intent is re-derived from current issue labels and used for gating (`missing-implement-intent` / `missing-implement-confirmed`), so upstream snapshot is ignored. [.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L256) [.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L263) - **Minimal fix shape**: 1. Add optional string inputs `implement_request`, `implement_confirmed` to `fugue-codex-implement` (`""` default). 2. Pass them from caller `codex-implement` job using `needs.ctx.outputs.has_implement_request` / `has_implement_confirmed`. 3. In `prepare` step, normalize override (`true|false|""`) and apply it to effective `HAS_IMPLEMENT` / `HAS_IMPLEMENT_CONFIRMED` before skip gating and before risk policy `--has-implement`. - **Required regression coverage (minimum)**: 1. Wiring regression: assert caller passes both fields to implement workflow, and implement workflow declares both inputs. 2. Prepare behavior regression: with label-missing issue payload + override `true/true`, `should_run` must stay `true`; with `true/false`, must fail with `missing-implement-confirmed`; with empty overrides, current label-based behavior unchanged. 3. Update existing guard tests that currently miss this path (`test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh` only checks vote/council wiring; `test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh` checks caller→router overrides, not caller→implement). [tests/test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh#L37) [tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh#L148)
